steps.title: Use maximum depth
steps.content: A species least suited to full migration into the mesophotic zone should have the shallowest demonstrated depth range, especially the maximum depth furthest from the 30-meter start of that zone.

steps.title: Find the farthest limit
steps.content: Choice B uses a minimum depth, which does not show the deepest tolerated conditions. Choice C reaches 25 meters, close to the mesophotic boundary. Choice D also uses a minimum depth. Astreopora expansa has a maximum depth of only 15 meters, furthest from 30 meters. The answer is A.
